# External Reference Downloads

Captured: 2026-03-08

This folder stores public reference material downloaded for Milestone D evidence gathering.
The goal is reproducible local access to official or public pages, not a claim that every file
here is normative validation evidence by itself.

## Structure

- `eu/cnossos-method/`
  - `eur-lex-2015-996.html`
    - Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/dir/2015/996/oj/eng
  - `eur-lex-2015-996.pdf`
    - Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/PDF/?uri=CELEX%3A32015L0996
  - `jrc-cnossos-publication.html`
    - Source: https://op.europa.eu/en/publication-detail/-/publication/80bca144-bd3a-46fb-8beb-47e16ab603db/language-en
  - `jrc-cnossos-publication.pdf`
    - Source: https://op.europa.eu/o/opportal-service/download-handler?identifier=80bca144-bd3a-46fb-8beb-47e16ab603db&format=pdf&language=en&productionSystem=cellar&part=

- `eea/noise/`
  - `eea-noise-topic.html`
    - Source: https://www.eea.europa.eu/en/topics/in-depth/noise
    - Note: used as the current replacement for the older `.../themes/human/noise/noise-2` URL, which returned `410 Gone` to direct download requests.
  - `eea-noise-service.html`
    - Source: https://www.eea.europa.eu/data-and-maps/data/external/noise-observation-and-information-service
    - Note: this is a small launcher page that embeds the current EEA NOISE story map.
  - `cdr-end-data-reporting.html`
    - Source: https://cdr.eionet.europa.eu/help/aqd/noise
  - `cdr-annex-df0.pdf`
    - Source: https://cdr.eionet.europa.eu/help/noise/Annex_DF0.pdf
  - `cdr-annex-df2.pdf`
    - Source: https://cdr.eionet.europa.eu/help/noise/Annex_DF2.pdf
  - `cdr-annex-df3.pdf`
    - Source: https://cdr.eionet.europa.eu/help/noise/Annex_DF3.pdf
  - `cdr-annex-df6-9.pdf`
    - Source: https://cdr.eionet.europa.eu/help/noise/Annex_DF6_9.pdf
  - `cdr-annex-df1-5-changes2017.pdf`
    - Source: https://cdr.eionet.europa.eu/help/noise/Annex_DF1_5_Changes2017.pdf
  - `cdr-annex-df4-8-update2018.pdf`
    - Source: https://cdr.eionet.europa.eu/help/noise/Annex_DF4_8_Update2018.pdf
  - `cdr-annex-df7-10-update2018.pdf`
    - Source: https://cdr.eionet.europa.eu/help/noise/Annex_DF7_10_Update2018.pdf
  - `cdr-electronic-noise-data-reporting-mechanism-v2017-finaldraft.pdf`
    - Source: https://cdr.eionet.europa.eu/help/noise/Electronic%20Noise%20Data%20Reporting%20Mechanism%2012-2012%20v2017_finaldraft.pdf

- `germany/noise/`
  - `uba-noise-maps.html`
    - Source: https://www.umweltbundesamt.de/themen/laerm/umgebungslaermrichtlinie/laermkarten

## Notes

- The files were downloaded because they were publicly accessible at capture time.
- This does not mean all of them contain module-level validation scenarios; some are method texts,
  reporting guidance, or public portals that can support later evidence collection.
- If you want, the next useful step is a curated index that classifies each downloaded item as:
  `method`, `reporting-guidance`, `public-portal`, `candidate-validation-source`, or `not-useful`.
